resolutions.reasoning: emFontCache maps to em_font.rs EmFont with OnceLock-based singleton. Core glyph lookup is ported via get_glyph/atlas.
emGetResImage loads images from Eagle Mode install paths. No equivalent resource loading in Rust; images loaded differently.
emTryGetResImage is the try variant of emGetResImage. Same: not ported.

resolutions.superseding_construct: Rc<Look> held per-widget, accessed via widget struct fields rather than Border method
resolutions.reasoning: Look is stored at the widget level in Rust, not on Border. Functional equivalent exists but with different access pattern.

resolutions.superseding_construct: Rc<Look> replacement at widget level via Rc::clone
resolutions.reasoning: SetLook replaced by direct Rc<Look> assignment at widget level.

resolutions.superseding_construct: Dialog::layout_children manages content area positionally without separate accessor
resolutions.reasoning: Content panel concept replaced by layout_children positioning. No separate accessor needed.
Save/TrySave collapsed to single save() returning Result. Functionally equivalent.
Load/TryLoad collapsed to single load() returning Result. Functionally equivalent.
LoadOrInstall/TryLoadOrInstall collapsed to load_or_install() returning Result.

resolutions.superseding_construct: Synchronous loading makes progress tracking unnecessary
resolutions.reasoning: RecFileModel loads synchronously in Rust; progress is always 0 or 100, no CalcFileProgress needed.
No bulk clear_touches method in Rust InputState. Only per-id remove_touch exists.
